raw: {"perspective": "Cultural Intelligence", "findings": [{"file_path": "apps/api/app/routers/grievance.py", "what_exists": "Grievance filing and review endpoint", "what_it_does": "Handles user grievances about AURA scores, allowing users to file and track grievances, and admins to review and resolve them", "quality_assessment": "Meets requirements, but could improve with additional validation and error handling"}], "summary": "The grievance endpoint is functional and compliant with ISO 10667-2 §7, but may benefit from further refinement to ensure robustness and security", "next_files_to_read": ["apps/api/app/schemas/assessment.py", "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md"], "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.what_it_does: Handles user grievances about AURA scores, allowing users to file and track grievances, and admins to review and resolve them
findings.quality_assessment: Meets requirements, but could improve with additional validation and error handling

summary: The grievance endpoint is functional and compliant with ISO 10667-2 §7, but may benefit from further refinement to ensure robustness and security
